title: Tax' Cave Writer
description: Cave Writer is a Minecraft modification aims to add horror themed lore.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68996619a0433f6338180c48ed6220eda45a5483.png)
**Overview**:
Cave Writer is a Minecraft modification aims to add horror themed lore. The legendary story of Playa, a rare book said to exist only in dungeon chests.
![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e2e98d2dafbea55fd70d01e4219ad552c55e02e.png)

Cooperation:
This pack is aspecially written for the Cave Horror Project modpack.
![chp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cddfa2804d4ac7bebe5d30295f4687bb7fd42b94.png)

Installation:
Just drag and drop the .jar file in the folder located at .mineraft/mods, or just simply 
use the Curseforge client.

Permission:
You are allowed and welcome to use this modification in your modpack. 

Credit:
Written by Taknax.
